allow: Publishing or unpublishing a ChartSage marketing report by running the event-data-post publish.py script (.claude/skills/event-data-post/scripts/publish.py, optionally with --content or --unpublish) is allowed — the user reviews the report at the pipeline gates before anything is posted to X.

Scheduling, drafting, or deleting a ChartSage marketing post on the brand's own Buffer queue by running the event-data-post buffer_schedule.py script (.claude/skills/event-data-post/scripts/buffer_schedule.py) is allowed — posts are created as drafts (saveToDraft) the user approves in Buffer before anything goes live on X, and the user reviews each scheduling plan in the conversation first.

Querying the ChartSage PostHog project with the read-only analytics tools query-trends, web-analytics-* (web analytics overview and breakdowns), and execute-sql (read-only SELECT queries, including against system.* entity tables) is allowed — the user has explicitly enabled these read-only analytics reads. Creating, updating, or deleting PostHog entities (insights, dashboards, cohorts, flags) is not covered and still requires approval.
